parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: If set, this will capture data from the cameras.

parameters.name: api
parameters.label: API
parameters.description: Select between Leap Motion V2 or V4/V5 SDKs for tracking. V5 offers the fastest and most stable tracking, V2 offers some legacy features like gestures.

parameters.name: libfolder
parameters.label: Library Folder
parameters.description: This parameter should point to the location of the library file (.dll on Windows) that corresponds to the selected API version. The dll file can be found in the driver kit downloaded from the Ultra Le

parameters.name: camera
parameters.label: Camera
parameters.description: Select between the two cameras in the Leap Motion Controller.

parameters.name: correction
parameters.label: Image Correction
parameters.description: Corrects the image for lens distortion.

parameters.name: hmd
parameters.label: HMD Mode
parameters.description: Switches the device to ead ounted isplay mode.
